nonPublicSkills.description: Skill slugs that exist on disk but must not appear in README Taxonomy (consumer-internal skills)

customize.description: Customize inject options for IDE hooks and `skeleton customize resolve`

alwaysInclude.description: Basenames under .skeleton/customize/ appended whenever a skill customize injects (even if the slug file is missing or empty)

skillOwnership.description: Provenance-aware skill body linting: foreign (synced) skills are skipped; owned local skills and .skeleton/customize stay audited

ownedSlugs.description: Force these skill slugs to be treated as owned (lint here) even when the lockfile marks them foreign

foreignSlugs.description: Force these skill slugs to be treated as foreign (skip body lint) even when absent from the lockfile

plugins.description: Plugin entry paths relative to .skeleton/; each entry must have a built sibling .mjs (run skeleton build-plugin)

draftPathPrefixes.description: Allow-list directory prefixes for draft-marker prose-policy placement (plus _draft-*.md filenames). Trailing / is implied. Repo-relative only (e.g. drafts/) — not ., ./, or /. Not scan.exclude.
